nasb.text: for in one hour such great wealth has been laid waste!’ And every shipmaster and every passenger and sailor, and as many as make their living by the sea, stood at a distance,

esv.text: For in a single hour all this wealth has been laid waste.” And all shipmasters and seafaring men, sailors and all whose trade is on the sea, stood far off

cnv.text: 一時之間，這麼大的財富竟蕩然無存！’ “所有船長、旅客、水手，以及凡是靠海謀生的，都遠遠地站著。

ccb.text: 因为顷刻间你这一切的繁华都化为乌有了。’所有船主、乘客、水手及靠海为生的人都远远地站着，

csbs.text: 这么多的财富，竟然在一时之间就化为乌有了！” 所有的船长、所有到处航行的人、水手们、所有靠海为业的人，都远远地站着。
